## Does this need an ADR?

If this involves a real architectural trade-off (not just an
implementation detail), it probably needs an entry in `docs/adr/` - see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).

- [ ] Yes, I'll draft an ADR
- [ ] No, this is a straightforward implementation detail
